subject: LU-12100 tests: Use least qunit to set limit

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

parents.subject: LU-12854 nodemap: allow boolean value for audit_mode

commit.subject: LU-12100 tests: Use least qunit to set limit
commit.message:
LU-12100 tests: Use least qunit to set limit

Use least qunit to set lower limit for inodes in sanity-quota/2
This ensures that the limit is set at or above the minimum size.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-quota
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-quota fstype=zfs
